/usr/bin/ar qc lib2048_engine.a CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/2048.cpp.o CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/gameboard.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/gameboard-graphics.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/game.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/game-graphics.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/game-input.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/game-pregamemenu.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/global.cpp.o CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/loadresource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/menu.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/menu-graphics.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/saveresource.cpp.o CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/scores.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/scores-graphics.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/statistics.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/statistics-graphics.cpp.o" CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/tile.cpp.o "CMakeFiles/2048_engine.dir/src/tile-graphics.cpp.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib lib2048_engine.a
